description: Python 2 から Python 3 への完全移行

old_entries.content: Backend services written in Python 2.7. Using print statements, urllib2, and unicode strings prefixed with u''.

new_entries.content: All backend services migrated to Python 3.11. Using f-strings, pathlib, and type hints. Python 2.7 support dropped.

query: What Python version are the backend services using?

description: MySQL から PostgreSQL への移行

old_entries.content: Primary database is MySQL 5.7. Using MyISAM engine for some tables. InnoDB for transactional data.

new_entries.content: Migrated to PostgreSQL 15. All tables using native PG features: JSONB, full-text search, and window functions. MySQL fully decommissioned.

query: What database system is the project currently using?

description: Jenkins から GitHub Actions への移行

old_entries.content: CI/CD runs on Jenkins. Self-hosted on EC2 instance. Jenkinsfile defines pipeline stages. Average build time: 18 minutes.

new_entries.content: Migrated CI/CD to GitHub Actions. Workflows defined in .github/workflows/. Average build time reduced to 7 minutes with caching. Jenkins decommissioned.

query: What CI/CD system is currently in use?

description: REST から GraphQL への移行

old_entries.content: External API is RESTful. 42 endpoints documented in Swagger. Versioning via URL prefix /api/v1/.

new_entries.content: Migrated public API to GraphQL. Single endpoint /graphql. Schema-first development. REST endpoints kept for legacy client compatibility until Q4.

query: What API style does the public API currently use?

description: Redux から Zustand への状態管理移行

old_entries.content: Frontend state management uses Redux with redux-thunk for async actions. 25 reducers, 180 actions defined.

new_entries.content: Replaced Redux with Zustand for state management. Reduced boilerplate by 70%. Bundle size decreased 45KB. All 25 stores rewritten.

query: What state management library is the frontend currently using?

description: Heroku から AWS への移行

old_entries.content: Application deployed on Heroku. Using dynos (2x standard) for web and worker processes. Heroku Postgres as database.

new_entries.content: Migrated from Heroku to AWS. Using ECS Fargate for containers, RDS Aurora for database, and CloudFront for CDN. Cost reduced 40%.

query: Where is the application currently deployed?

description: Webpack から Vite への移行

old_entries.content: Frontend build tool is Webpack 4. Cold start: 45 seconds. HMR takes 3-8 seconds. Complex configuration in webpack.config.js.

new_entries.content: Migrated frontend build to Vite 5. Cold start: 800ms. HMR: instant. Configuration simplified to vite.config.ts. No breaking changes in output.

query: What is the current frontend build tool?

description: Slack から Teams への社内通信ツール移行

old_entries.content: Team communication via Slack. 45 active channels. Using integrations with GitHub, JIRA, and PagerDuty.

new_entries.content: Company-wide migration to Microsoft Teams completed. All Slack integrations recreated in Teams. Slack access revoked on June 30.

query: What communication platform does the team currently use?

description: Jest から Vitest への移行

old_entries.content: Frontend testing with Jest and React Testing Library. Test run time: 3.5 minutes for 450 tests. CommonJS module resolution.

new_entries.content: Migrated frontend tests from Jest to Vitest. Test run time: 28 seconds for same 450 tests. Native ESM support. Config in vitest.config.ts.

query: What testing framework is used for frontend tests?

description: nginx から Caddy へのリバースプロキシ移行

old_entries.content: Reverse proxy using nginx 1.18. Manual TLS certificate management with Let's Encrypt. Config in /etc/nginx/nginx.conf.

new_entries.content: Replaced nginx with Caddy 2. Automatic TLS via ACME. Simpler Caddyfile configuration. Zero-downtime config reloads. Nginx fully removed.

query: What reverse proxy is currently being used?

description: ElasticSearch バージョンアップ

old_entries.content: Search powered by Elasticsearch 6.8. Using basic full-text search with BM25. 3-node cluster.

new_entries.content: Upgraded to Elasticsearch 8.12. Enabled vector search with HNSW. Added KNN-based semantic search capability. Cluster expanded to 5 nodes.

query: What version of Elasticsearch is running and what search capabilities are enabled?

description: PHP から Node.js へのバックエンド移行

old_entries.content: Backend API built with PHP 7.4 and Laravel 8. Deployed on Apache with mod_php.

new_entries.content: Backend rewritten in Node.js 20 with Fastify. 3x throughput improvement. Deployed on ECS. PHP/Laravel fully retired.

query: What language and framework powers the backend API?

description: Confluence から Notion へのドキュメント移行

old_entries.content: Team documentation on Confluence. 340 pages. Slow search. Complex space structure. Paid license: $12/user/month.

new_entries.content: Migrated all documentation to Notion. 340 pages migrated. Faster search. Better organization with databases. Cost: $8/user/month. Confluence cancelled.

query: What documentation tool does the team currently use?

description: Kubernetes バージョンアップ

old_entries.content: Running Kubernetes 1.24 on EKS. Using Helm 3 for deployments. No service mesh.

new_entries.content: Upgraded to Kubernetes 1.29 on EKS. Added Istio service mesh for mTLS and traffic management. Helm charts updated for new API versions.

query: What Kubernetes version is running and what new capabilities were added?

description: Stripe API バージョンアップ

old_entries.content: Using Stripe API version 2020-08-27. Payment Intents API for card processing. Webhooks handled with stripe-node v8.

new_entries.content: Upgraded to Stripe API 2024-04-10. Using stripe-node v15. Added support for Link (one-click checkout) and Stripe Climate. Webhook signatures updated.

query: What Stripe API version is currently in use and what new features were added?

description: TypeScript バージョンアップ（部分的に内容変化）

old_entries.content: Project uses TypeScript 4.5. Strict mode enabled. Using const enums for type-safe enumerations.

new_entries.content: Upgraded to TypeScript 5.3. Strict mode maintained. Replaced const enums with satisfies operator pattern. Using new verbatimModuleSyntax flag.

query: What TypeScript version is the project using and what configuration changes were made?

description: Docker イメージの更新（類似コンテンツ）

old_entries.content: Base Docker image: node:18-alpine. Multi-stage build. Image size: 145MB. Using npm for package installation.

new_entries.content: Updated base Docker image to node:20-alpine. Multi-stage build retained. Image size reduced to 98MB using pnpm. Added security scanning in CI.

query: What base Docker image and package manager are currently being used?

description: OpenAI モデルの更新

old_entries.content: AI features powered by GPT-3.5-turbo. Context window: 4096 tokens. Used for chat completion and text summarization.

new_entries.content: Upgraded to GPT-4o for all AI features. Context window: 128k tokens. Added vision capabilities for image analysis. Costs managed with prompt caching.

query: What AI model is powering the application's AI features?

description: TailwindCSS バージョンアップ

old_entries.content: Styling with TailwindCSS v2. PurgeCSS configured manually. JIT mode enabled via experimental flag. postcss.config.js required.

new_entries.content: Upgraded to TailwindCSS v3. JIT mode default. Arbitrary values support. postcss config simplified. Added @layer utilities for custom components.

query: What version of TailwindCSS is in use and what changed?

description: Redis のバージョンと設定変更

old_entries.content: Redis 6.2 for caching. Single instance. TTL: 3600 seconds for all keys. No persistence enabled.

new_entries.content: Upgraded to Redis 7.2. Cluster mode with 3 shards. TTL varies by data type: session 86400s, cache 3600s, rate-limit 60s. RDB persistence enabled.

query: What Redis version and configuration is currently deployed?

description: 認証ライブラリの更新（NextAuth → Auth.js）

old_entries.content: Authentication handled by NextAuth.js v3. Supports Google and GitHub OAuth providers. Sessions stored in JWT.

new_entries.content: Migrated to Auth.js v5 (formerly NextAuth). Added email/password with Argon2 hashing. Sessions in database for revocation support. Google and GitHub OAuth retained.

query: What authentication library and session storage are currently in use?

description: ORM の変更（Sequelize → Drizzle）

old_entries.content: Database access via Sequelize v6. Model-based ORM with associations and migrations.

new_entries.content: Replaced Sequelize with Drizzle ORM. Type-safe SQL queries. Schema-as-code in TypeScript. 60% faster query execution. Drizzle Kit for migrations.

query: What ORM is currently used for database access?

description: ロギングの変更（Winston → Pino）

old_entries.content: Application logging with Winston. Custom format with timestamps. Log levels: error, warn, info, debug. Output to console and files.

new_entries.content: Replaced Winston with Pino for logging. 5x faster throughput. Structured JSON output. pino-pretty for development. Same log levels retained. File transport removed.

query: What logging library is the application using?

description: メール送信サービスの変更

old_entries.content: Transactional emails sent via SendGrid. Using v3 API. Templates managed in SendGrid dashboard. 10,000 emails/month.

new_entries.content: Migrated from SendGrid to Resend for transactional emails. React Email for template development. Better developer experience. Cost savings of 30%. Same sending volume.

query: What email service is being used for transactional emails?

description: 監視ツールの変更（Datadog → Grafana Cloud）

old_entries.content: Infrastructure and application monitoring via Datadog. APM traces, logs, and metrics. Cost: $3,200/month.

new_entries.content: Migrated from Datadog to Grafana Cloud OSS stack: Prometheus, Loki, Tempo, Grafana. Same coverage. Cost: $800/month (75% reduction). 2-week migration.

query: What monitoring stack is currently in use and what is the cost?

description: テーマカラーの変更（類似コンテンツ）

old_entries.content: Brand primary color: #2563EB (blue). Secondary: #7C3AED (purple). Accent: #10B981 (green). Dark mode: #1F2937.

new_entries.content: Updated brand colors after rebrand: primary #1D4ED8 (deeper blue). Secondary: #6D28D9 (richer purple). Accent: #059669. Dark mode: #111827. All components updated.

query: What are the current brand primary colors?

description: SLO の変更（類似コンテンツ）

old_entries.content: SLO targets: API availability 99.9%, p95 latency < 500ms, error rate < 0.5%. Error budget: 43.8 minutes/month.

new_entries.content: Updated SLOs after infrastructure improvements: API availability 99.95%, p95 latency < 200ms, error rate < 0.1%. Error budget: 21.9 minutes/month.

query: What are the current SLO targets for the API?

description: 開発環境の変更（類似内容）

old_entries.content: Local development using Docker Compose. Services: web (Node.js), db (Postgres), redis, mailhog. Setup time: 15 minutes for new devs.

new_entries.content: Migrated local dev to Nix flakes. Services: web (Node.js), db (Postgres), redis, mailhog. Setup time: 3 minutes. Reproducible across macOS and Linux. Docker Compose removed.

query: How is the local development environment configured?

description: Prisma バージョンアップ（類似内容）

old_entries.content: Database ORM: Prisma 4.14. Schema in schema.prisma. Migrations via prisma migrate. Connection pooling via PgBouncer.

new_entries.content: Upgraded to Prisma 5.10. Schema in schema.prisma (unchanged). Prisma Accelerate for edge-ready connection pooling. PgBouncer replaced. 40% query speed improvement.

query: What Prisma version and connection pooling solution are currently in use?

description: CI ゲート閾値の更新（類似内容）

old_entries.content: CI quality gates: test coverage >= 70%, no new ESLint errors, bundle size < 500KB. Fails build if not met.

new_entries.content: Updated CI quality gates: test coverage >= 80%, no new ESLint errors, bundle size < 450KB, Lighthouse score >= 90. Stricter thresholds after performance initiative.

query: What are the current CI quality gate thresholds?

description: 認証トークン有効期限の変更（類似内容）

old_entries.content: JWT access tokens expire in 1 hour. Refresh tokens: 30 days. Single refresh token per user session. No rotation.

new_entries.content: Updated token policy: access tokens expire in 15 minutes. Refresh tokens: 7 days with rotation. Max 5 concurrent sessions. Old refresh tokens invalidated on rotation.

query: What are the current JWT token expiration settings?

description: Terraform バージョンアップ（類似内容）

old_entries.content: Infrastructure as code with Terraform 1.3. State in S3 with DynamoDB locking. Modules: vpc, eks, rds, cloudfront.

new_entries.content: Upgraded Terraform to 1.7. Same modules with updated provider versions. Added Terraform test framework for module validation. State backend unchanged.

query: What Terraform version is in use and what was added?

description: スプリント期間の変更（類似内容）

old_entries.content: Engineering team runs 2-week sprints. Sprint planning Monday, retrospective Friday of week 2. 8 engineers across 2 squads.

new_entries.content: Switched from 2-week to 1-week sprints for faster feedback. Sprint planning every Monday, retrospective every Friday. 8 engineers across 2 squads (unchanged).

query: What is the current sprint cadence for the engineering team?

description: Node.js バージョンアップ（類似内容）

old_entries.content: Runtime: Node.js 18.12 LTS. Using npm 9 for package management. .nvmrc file specifies 18.12.0.

new_entries.content: Upgraded runtime to Node.js 22 LTS. Using Corepack + pnpm 9 for package management. .nvmrc updated to 22.0.0. Native fetch enabled.

query: What Node.js version and package manager are currently in use?

description: バックアップ間隔の変更（類似内容）

old_entries.content: Database backups: daily full backup at 02:00 UTC. Retained for 30 days. Backup stored in S3 us-east-1.

new_entries.content: Updated backup policy: hourly incremental backups, daily full backup at 02:00 UTC. Retained 90 days. Cross-region replication to us-west-2. Point-in-time recovery enabled.

query: What is the current database backup schedule and retention policy?

description: APIレート制限の変更（高類似ディストラクター、Hard）

old_entries.content: API rate limit: 100 requests per minute per API key. Exceeding limit returns 429. Limit applies to all endpoints equally.

new_entries.content: API rate limit updated: 120 requests per minute per API key. Exceeding limit returns 429. Limit applies to all endpoints equally. Burst allowance: 150 req for 10 seconds.

query: What is the current API rate limit per minute?

description: データベース接続プールサイズの変更（高類似）

old_entries.content: Database connection pool: min=5, max=20. Connection timeout: 30000ms. Idle timeout: 10000ms. Using pg-pool v3.

new_entries.content: Database connection pool updated: min=5, max=25. Connection timeout: 30000ms. Idle timeout: 10000ms. Using pg-pool v3. Max adjusted after load testing showed exhaustion at peak.

query: What is the current maximum database connection pool size?

description: ログレベルのデフォルト変更（高類似）

old_entries.content: Default log level: info. Debug logs disabled in production. Sensitive fields redacted: password, token, secret. Log format: JSON.

new_entries.content: Default log level changed to warn in production (info in staging). Debug logs disabled in production. Sensitive fields redacted: password, token, secret, api_key. Log format: JSON.

query: What is the current default log level in production?

description: セッションタイムアウトの変更（高類似）

old_entries.content: User session timeout: 24 hours of inactivity. Absolute session limit: 7 days. Remember-me option extends to 30 days.

new_entries.content: Updated session policy: timeout 8 hours of inactivity (reduced for security). Absolute session limit: 7 days. Remember-me option: 30 days. Change applies to new sessions only.

query: What is the current session inactivity timeout?

description: 最大アップロードサイズの変更（高類似）

old_entries.content: File upload limit: 10MB per file, maximum 5 files per request. Accepted types: jpg, png, gif, pdf. Stored in S3 with CloudFront CDN.

new_entries.content: File upload limit updated: 25MB per file, maximum 10 files per request. Accepted types: jpg, png, gif, pdf, webp, mp4. Stored in S3 with CloudFront CDN. Limit increased per enterprise customer request.

query: What is the current maximum file upload size and how many files can be uploaded per request?

description: パスワード最小長の変更（高類似、1週間以内）

old_entries.content: Password policy: minimum 10 characters, at least 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, 1 number. Special characters optional. Bcrypt rounds: 12.

new_entries.content: Password policy updated: minimum 12 characters, at least 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, 1 number, 1 special character. Bcrypt rounds: 12. Changed per security audit recommendation.

query: What is the current minimum password length requirement?

description: キャッシュTTLの変更（高類似）

old_entries.content: Cache TTL settings: user profiles 3600s, product listings 1800s, search results 300s, user sessions 86400s.

new_entries.content: Cache TTL settings updated: user profiles 7200s, product listings 1800s, search results 600s, user sessions 86400s. Profile and search TTLs increased to reduce DB load.

query: What is the current cache TTL for user profiles and search results?

description: ヘルスチェックエンドポイントの変更（高類似）

old_entries.content: Health check endpoint: GET /health. Returns {status: 'ok'} with 200. Checks: server running only. Used by load balancer every 30s.

new_entries.content: Health check endpoint updated: GET /health. Returns {status: 'ok', db: 'connected', redis: 'connected', version: 'v3.5.1'} with 200. Checks: server, DB connectivity, Redis. Load balancer interval unchanged at 30s.

query: What does the health check endpoint currently return?

description: ページサイズのデフォルト変更（高類似）

old_entries.content: API pagination: default page size 20, maximum 100. Cursor-based pagination for most endpoints. Offset pagination for reports.

new_entries.content: API pagination updated: default page size 50, maximum 200. Cursor-based pagination for most endpoints. Offset pagination for reports. Increased defaults based on client feedback.

query: What is the current default and maximum page size for API pagination?

description: モデル推論タイムアウトの変更（高類似）

old_entries.content: AI inference timeout: 30 seconds per request. Retry: 2 attempts with exponential backoff. Fallback: return cached result if available.

new_entries.content: AI inference timeout updated: 45 seconds per request (increased for complex queries). Retry: 2 attempts with exponential backoff. Fallback: return cached result if available. Timeout adjusted after p99 latency analysis.

query: What is the current AI inference timeout setting?

description: Webhook 署名アルゴリズムの変更（高類似）

old_entries.content: Webhook signatures use HMAC-SHA256. Signature in X-Webhook-Signature header. Timestamp in X-Webhook-Timestamp. Replay attack window: 5 minutes.

new_entries.content: Webhook signatures unchanged: HMAC-SHA256. Signature in X-Webhook-Signature header. Timestamp in X-Webhook-Timestamp. Replay attack window reduced to 3 minutes for better security.

query: What is the current webhook replay attack prevention window?

description: 最大同時接続数の変更（高類似）

old_entries.content: WebSocket max concurrent connections per server: 5,000. Nginx upstream keepalive: 32. Total capacity: 15,000 (3 servers).

new_entries.content: WebSocket max concurrent connections per server increased: 8,000. Nginx upstream keepalive: 64. Total capacity: 24,000 (3 servers). Increased after connection limit hit in stress test.

query: What is the current maximum WebSocket connections per server?

description: ビルドキャッシュの設定変更（高類似）

old_entries.content: CI cache: npm install cached by package-lock.json hash. Docker layer cache via actions/cache. Cache retention: 7 days.

new_entries.content: CI cache updated: pnpm store cached by pnpm-lock.yaml hash. Docker layer cache via actions/cache. Cache retention: 14 days. npm → pnpm change required cache key update.

query: What is the current CI cache configuration and retention period?

description: Datadog トレースサンプリングレートの変更（高類似）

old_entries.content: Datadog APM trace sampling: 100% for error traces, 10% for successful traces. Head-based sampling. Monthly trace volume: ~50M.

new_entries.content: Datadog APM trace sampling updated: 100% for error traces, 5% for successful traces. Head-based sampling unchanged. Monthly trace volume: ~28M. Cost reduced 30%.

query: What is the current trace sampling rate for successful requests?

description: アラート閾値の変更（高類似）

old_entries.content: Alert thresholds: error rate > 1% for 5 minutes triggers P1. CPU > 80% for 10 minutes triggers warning. Memory > 90% triggers critical.

new_entries.content: Alert thresholds updated: error rate > 0.5% for 5 minutes triggers P1 (tightened). CPU > 80% for 10 minutes triggers warning. Memory > 85% triggers critical (tightened). Changes applied after incident review.

query: What error rate threshold currently triggers a P1 alert?
